race_meta.race_name: BAR 1 Betting 'Best Odds Guaranteed' Maiden Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked healys pub at position 4 with only 12.0% probability. Top pick was Colcannon (32.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Colcannon > Sine Qua Non, but actual result was Healys Pub > Doctor Elvis. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Healys Pub had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -3.4%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
